## Checklist

- [ ] The change is focused and contains no secrets or client data.
- [ ] Relevant PHP, JavaScript, build, or browser checks ran.
- [ ] Documentation and changelog are updated where needed.
- [ ] Generated client code does not force Sonny x Inkfire branding.
- [ ] Compiled runtime assets are included where distribution requires them.
